features: Treat yourself to a moisturising, beautifully fragrant shower experience with Palmolive Naturals Milk & Honey Shower Cream.
With familiar ingredients of 95% natural origin*
it’s a little time to enjoy reconnecting with nature.
Our shower cream, with plant-based moisturising milk
A gentle, 95% biodegradable formula that's been dermatologically tested
description: Product Description Treat yourself to a moisturising, beautifully fragrant shower experience with Palmolive Naturals Milk & Honey Shower Cream. With familiar ingredients of 95% natural origin*, it’s a little time to enjoy reconnecting with nature. Our shower cream, with plant-based moisturising milk, also has a gentle, 95% biodegradable formula that's been dermatologically tested and comes in a recyclable plastic bottle. *Water and naturally sourced ingredients with limited processing. Ingredients Aqua, Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Sodium Chloride, Parfum, Sodium Salicylate, Glycerin, Sodium Benzoate, Glycol Distearate, Lauryl Hydroxysultaine, Citric Acid, Polyquaternium-7, Coco-Glucoside, Tetrasodium EDTA, PEG-150 Pentaerythrityl Tetrastearate, PPG-2 Hydroxyethyl Cocamide, Glyceryl Oleate, Glyceryl Stearate, Lactose, Whey Protein, Mel, Benzyl Benzoate, Benzyl Salicylate, Hexyl Cinnamal
